memory_architecture.style_memory: Writing style observations extracted from supervisor-authored texts.
memory_architecture.revision_memory: Patterns learned from draft revisions and feedback.
memory_architecture.workflow_memory: Reusable writing and Zotero-assisted workflow preferences.

writing_style_features: Uses cautious academic claims and avoids overstatement.
Connects evidence to interpretation through explicit logical transitions.
structure_preferences: Begins paragraphs with a topic sentence.
Moves from observation to interpretation and then to broader implication.
revision_rules: Make the connection between evidence and interpretation explicit.
Flag unsupported claims instead of fabricating citations.
Do not invent literature, data, methods, results, or conclusions.
Use discipline-specific knowledge only when supplied through local context or Codex Skills.
revision_memory: Prefer concise topic sentences before detailed evidence.
Keep uncertainty visible when the source draft is uncertain.
workflow_memory: Import Zotero or pasted literature context.
Record revision patterns for future improvement.

zotero_sources.summary: Placeholder example profile for first-time users.

notes: This profile is domain-agnostic. Add specialized domain knowledge through local Codex Skills.
